mapper.select: select count(*) from setmeal where category_id=#{categoryId};
mapper.insert: insert into setmeal (id, category_id, name, price, status, code, description, image, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) VALUES (#{id},#{categoryId},#{name},#{price},#{status},#{code},#{description},#{image},#{createTime},#{updateTime},#{createUser},#{updateUser});
mapper.update:
update setmeal
category_id=#{categoryId},
name=#{name},
price=#{price},
description=#{description},
image=#{image},
update_time=#{updateTime},update_user=#{updateUser}
where id=#{id};
mapper.select: select * from setmeal where category_id=#{categoryId} and status=#{status} order by update_time desc;
